programme.title: Dream Wedding
programme.desc: When sisters Megan and Kate attend a local wedding fair, they enter for a dream wedding package.

programme.title: An Unlikely Angel
programme.desc: Businesswoman Janie is falling apart at the thought of becoming a mom.

programme.title: Swing Into Romance
programme.desc: A dancer pairs with an unlikely partner, entering a contest to save her family's general store.

programme.title: Ainsley McGregor Mysteries: A Case for the Winemaker
programme.desc: Former criminologist Ainsley McGregor springs back into action when her friend is accused of murder.

programme.title: Key to Love
programme.desc: Bookstore owner Samantha Hill starts an antagonistic relationship with a book cover model.

programme.title: One Perfect Match
programme.desc: A professional matchmaker finds that she has unexpectedly fallen for one of her clients.

programme.title: The Winter Palace
programme.desc: A novelist is given the chance to finish her book at an empty winter chateau.

programme.title: Strong Fathers, Strong Daughters
programme.desc: A businessman struggles to give up control of his daughter and trust God with her future.

programme.title: Just in Time
programme.desc: Hannah receives a call from a stranger, who claims to have discovered an heirloom from her family.

programme.title: A Royal in Paradise
programme.desc: Struggling with writer's block, Olivia takes a vacation and meets a prince who must marry royalty.

programme.title: Learning to Love - For Hopeless Romantics
programme.desc: Harry and his two daughters lose their faith and struggle to connect.

programme.desc: A businessman struggles to give up control of his daughter and trust God with her future.

programme.title: A Harvest Homecoming
programme.desc: A teacher returns home to help at the family cider mill, where he meets the new marketing manager.

programme.title: 'Twas the Text Before Christmas
programme.desc: A text message mistakenly sent to Addie leads to a friendship with the sender and a budding romance.
